name: Marbled Chocolate Cheesecake (Lo Cal)
recipeIngredient: 2 Eggs, yolks and whites separated, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, bring 3/4 cup milk to a boil over medium-high heat. Set aside.
2. Sprinkle gelatin over remaining 1/4 cup cold skim milk in blender container. Let stand for 4-5 minutes.
3. Add boiling skim milk and blend on low speed for 2 minutes.
4. Gradually add sugar, egg yolks, and vanilla; blend until well mixed.
5. Fold in cottage cheese; blend until smooth.
6. Remove 3/4 cup mixture and chill until thickens.
7. In a bowl, combine 1 tablespoon cocoa and remaining milk; blend until smooth.
8. Pour chocolate mixture into large bowl and stir occasionally until it mounds when dropped from spoon.
9. Beat egg whites with electric mixer until foamy. Gradually add sugar; beat until stiff peaks form.
10. Fold beaten whites into chocolate mixture.
11. Pour this chocolate mixture over the vanilla layer in prepared crust.
12. Gently swirl to create marbled effect. Cover and refrigerate for 4-5 hours or until firm.
Chocolate Crumb Crust:
1. Combine crumbs, cocoa, and melted butter in a bowl. Press evenly into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
